message:
fix(deps): replace unreachable!() with proper error handling

Convert assign_disclosure_levels() to return Result and replace
unreachable!() macro with proper error handling for the
DependencyLoadMode::Off case.

Before:
  DependencyLoadMode::Off => unreachable!()
  // Panic if ever reached - bad for library code

After:
  DependencyLoadMode::Off => {
      return Err(MsError::ValidationFailed(
          "dependency resolution requested with load mode off".to_string()
      ));
  }

This change:
1. Eliminates potential panics in library code
2. Provides actionable error message for debugging
3. Propagates error via Result to caller (resolve_plan)
4. Maintains type safety with explicit error variant

The function signature changes from:
  fn assign_disclosure_levels(...) -> Vec<SkillLoadPlan>
to:
  fn assign_disclosure_levels(...) -> Result<Vec<SkillLoadPlan>>

Caller (resolve_plan) updated to propagate with ? operator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
